create_time.description: Timestamp when the entitlement was created for audit purposes

etag.description: Entity tag for tracking changes to the entitlement resource

id.description: Unique identifier for the entitlement used in resource referencing

name.description: Fully qualified name of the entitlement for identification

state.description: Current operational state of the entitlement resource

update_time.description: Timestamp of the last update to the entitlement for tracking modifications
